# bytepluscc_clb_check_log_project (Resource)

CLB provides health check log capabilities and allows you to create a log topic to store and manage CLB health check logs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "bytepluscc_clb_check_log_project" "CLBCheckLogProjectDemo" {

}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `log_project_id` (String) Log Project ID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import bytepluscc_clb_check_log_project.example "log_project_id"
```
